visual_rule: Short directional lightning streak with a hot core and controlled branching filaments.
prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style lightning attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a short directional lightning streak with a white-hot center line, cyan glow, and a few controlled branching filaments. Keep the subject compact and readable, not beam-heavy or smoky. Preserve real electric energy structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
